title: Dozens protest peace deal outside Iran foreign ministry: media

snapshot.title: Dozens protest peace deal outside Iran foreign ministry: media
snapshot.description: PARIS: Dozens protested Saturday outside a foreign ministry office in Iran’s northeastern city of Mashhad, chanting slogans against top diplomat Abbas Araghchi after a televised interview in which he discussed signing a peace deal with the US. In a video shared by Fars news agency, women in black chadors chanted “death to dishonorable Araghchi, the infiltrator” in front of the
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Dozens protest peace deal outside Iran foreign ministry: media | Arab News
